mapper.sql:
SELECT A.PARAM_DATA_NO, A.PARAM_NO, A.PERSON_ID, A.RETURN_VALUE, BP.DISTINCT_FIELD, BP.DISTINCT_FIELD_2ND, SY0.CONTENT DISTINCT_FIELD_NAME, SY1.CONTENT DISTINCT_FIELD_2ND_NAME, D.EMPID, D.LOCAL_NAME, get_dept_name(D.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) DEPT_NAME, SY2.CONTENT POST_GRADE_NAME, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(D.EMP_OFFICE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) EMP_OFFICE, TO_CHAR(D.DATE_STARTED, 'YYYY-MM-DD') DATE_STARTED, TO_CHAR(D.DATE_LEFT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') DATE_LEFT, A.START_MONTH, A.END_MONTH, A.CPNY_ID, SY4.CONTENT CPNY_NAME, NVL(A.IS_APPLY, 'N') IS_APPLY, A.REMARK FROM PA_PARAM_DATA A, PA_PARAM_ITEM_PARAM BP, HR_EMPLOYEE D, HR_COMPANY HR, SY_GLOBAL_NAME SY0, SY_GLOBAL_NAME SY1, SY_GLOBAL_NAME SY2, SY_GLOBAL_NAME SY4, PA_DISTINCT_LIST PA1, PA_DISTINCT_LIST PA2 WHERE A.PARAM_NO = #{paramNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.PARAM_NO = BP.PARAM_NO AND BP.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND BP.DISTINCT_FIELD = PA1.DISTINCT_FIELD(+) AND BP.CPNY_ID = PA1.CPNY_ID(+) AND PA1.ID = SY0.NO(+) AND SY0.LANGUAGE(+) = #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND BP.DISTINCT_FIELD_2ND = PA2.DISTINCT_FIELD(+) AND BP.CPNY_ID = PA2.CPNY_ID(+) AND PA2.ID = SY1.NO(+) AND SY1.LANGUAGE(+) = #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.PERSON_ID = D.PERSON_ID AND D.POST_GRADE_NO = SY2.NO(+) AND SY2.LANGUAGE(+) = #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.CPNY_ID = HR.CPNY_ID AND HR.CPNY_NO = SY4.NO(+) AND SY4.LANGUAGE(+) = #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.ACTIVITY = 1
AND TO_DATE(#{payMonth, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'MMYYYY') >= TO_DATE(A.START_MONTH, 'MMYYYY') AND TO_DATE(#{payMonth, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'MMYYYY') <= TO_DATE(NVL(A.END_MONTH, '129999'), 'MMYYYY') AND (D.DATE_LEFT IS NULL OR TO_CHAR(D.DATE_LEFT, 'YYYYMM') >= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{payMonth, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'MMYYYY'), -2), 'YYYYMM'))
AND D.EMP_OFFICE = #{empOfficeSearch, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND INSTR(',' || #{deptNos, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || ',', ',' || D.DEPTNO || ',') > 0
AND (D.EMPID LIKE '%' || #{empSearch, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%' OR CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(D.LOCAL_NAME)) LIKE '%' || CONVERTTOUNSIGN(UPPER(#{empSearch, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) || '%')
mapper.select:
SELECT PARAM_DATA_NO, PARAM_NO, PERSON_ID, RETURN_VALUE, DISTINCT_FIELD, DISTINCT_FIELD_2ND, DISTINCT_FIELD_NAME, DISTINCT_FIELD_2ND_NAME, EMPID, LOCAL_NAME, DEPT_NAME, POST_GRADE_NAME, EMP_OFFICE, DATE_STARTED, DATE_LEFT, START_MONTH, END_MONTH, CPNY_ID, CPNY_NAME, IS_APPLY, REMARK FROM ( SELECT a.*, ROWNUM AS RN FROM (
ORDER BY D.PERSON_ID ) a WHERE ROWNUM <= #{start, jdbcType=NUMERIC} + #{length, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ) WHERE RN > #{start, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
SELECT PARAM_DATA_NO, PARAM_NO, PERSON_ID, RETURN_VALUE, START_MONTH, END_MONTH, IS_APPLY, REMARK, CPNY_ID FROM PA_PARAM_DATA WHERE PARAM_DATA_NO = #{paramDataNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PA_PARAM_DATA ( PARAM_DATA_NO, PARAM_NO, PERSON_ID, RETURN_VALUE, START_MONTH, END_MONTH, REMARK, CPNY_ID, ACTIVITY, CREATED_BY, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_IP ) VALUES ( PA_PARAM_DATA_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{paramNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{returnValue, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startMonth, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{endMonth, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: UPDATE PA_PARAM_DATA SET RETURN_VALUE = #{returnValue, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, START_MONTH = #{startMonth, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, END_MONTH = #{endMonth, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE PARAM_DATA_NO = #{paramDataNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PA_PARAM_DATA_TEMP ( PARAM_NO, EMPID, RETURN_VALUE, START_MONTH, END_MONTH, REMARK, LOCAL_NAME, CPNY_ID, UPLOAD_BY, UPLOAD_DATE, LINE_ID, UPLOAD_ERROR_MSG, RESULT_FLAG, ACTIVITY, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, CREATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{paramNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{empId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{returnValue, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startMonth, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{endMonth, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NVL(#{localName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, (SELECT LOCAL_NAME FROM HR_EMPLOYEE WHERE EMPID = #{empId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ROWNUM = 1)), #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{lineId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{uploadErrorMsg, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NVL(#{resultFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N'), 1, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select:
SELECT PARAM_NO, EMPID, RETURN_VALUE, START_MONTH, END_MONTH, REMARK, LOCAL_NAME, UPLOAD_ERROR_MSG, LINE_ID, RESULT_FLAG, UPLOAD_BY, TO_CHAR(UPLOAD_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UPLOAD_DATE FROM PA_PARAM_DATA_TEMP WHERE UPLOAD_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND UPLOAD_ERROR_MSG IS NOT NULL
AND (UPLOAD_ERROR_MSG IS NULL OR UPLOAD_ERROR_MSG = '')
ORDER BY LINE_ID
